---
title: 'Love Birds, a Painting by Flavia Wolfe'
date: '2017-11-28T06:51:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Creatively Unique Arts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4711344132701298221'
blogger_filename: '/2017/11/love-birds-painting-by-flavia-wolfe.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Creatively Unique Arts/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Art'
---

This is a painting Flavia intends to use for an upcoming Art Class.<br />
<br />
Love Birds, a Painting by Flavia Wolfe<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/love-birds-3bbc83a26cf4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1440" data-original-width="810" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/love-birds-94aef23c5c6d.jpg" width="360" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
